context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: None of my logs are reaching Coralogix. I've tried adding a transform processor with set(attributes["forwarded"], true)

checklist.name: no-response-prescribes-ottl-fixes-transform-t
checklist.description: Declines to treat this as an OTTL problem and redirects to infrastructure troubleshooting — receiver connectivity, exporter endpoint/auth, pipeline wiring, or Coralogix endpoint configuration — before offering any OTTL YAML. If the response prescribes OTTL fixes (transform tweaks, different statements) as the primary answer, that is a FAIL.
